content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the right ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears to be on track navigating the right-hand bend.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 50, target = 50 + 5 = 55
- Waypoint 55: (4.3589, 3.0602)
- Car position: (5.2215, 2.6307)
- Bearing = atan2(3.0602 - 2.6307, 4.3589 - 5.2215) = atan2(0.4295, -0.8626)
- = 180 - atan2(0.4295, 0.8626) = 180 - 26.48° = 153.52°
- Current heading: 175.90°
- Delta = 153.52 - 175.90 = -22.38° → right correction needed

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead, delta to target waypoint 55 is -22.38° indicating continued right correction needed, applying -20 steering at speed 1.0 to follow the waypoint line through the right curve.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track has a long straight section heading ~180° (due west) along y≈2.77",
    "Right-curving section spans waypoints 48-58, delta consistently -18 to -23°",
    "Car is consistently ~0.13-0.17m left of center — slight left bias throughout",
    "Full circuit ~17.7m, speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for moderate curves",
    "Use steering_angle=0 for delta <5° to avoid oscillation on near-straight sections",
    "Track width ~0.76m — 0.17m left of center is safe but watch for tightening",
    "Heading is ~176° (essentially due west), track curves right (south) ahead",
    "Delta around -22° in this section confirms consistent right curve",
    "Speed 1.0 used for delta ~20-23°; reduce only for sharp turns >30° delta",
    "Waypoints 50-58 show gradual right curve continuing, maintain -20 steering"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.5756, 5.4822, 5.3762, 5.2864, 5.2215],
    "y": [2.6130, 2.6036, 2.6021, 2.6127, 2.6307],
    "yaw": [-176.744, -176.100, -177.092, 179.597, 175.900]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": -22.38,
  "speed": 1.0,
  "steering_angle": -20.0
}
```
